title: Better Mc Performance
description: This Mod Pack gives the best Fps/Performance to Minecraft!
body:
# Better Mc Performance
## Why Better Mc Performance
This is an **ModPack** that is **completely optimize**d! Get the **best Fps** now! Only **one click**! **Easy** to **install**! Have **fun**!
## How to install?
You can install any modpack using modrinth launcher. You can customize easily and there is no limit.
## Features?
1. Improves Fps to the maximum!
2. Completely customizability!
3. Only one click to install!
## Included

## Extra Info
Have **Fun**!

**Support** Me by **Downloading** it!

Have issues or ideas [join my Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/ETTr37p38R)!
